FARUMA · AI Lesson Planner for Maldivian Teachers

About FARUMA

FARUMA is an AI-powered planning assistant built for Maldivian teachers. Every lesson plan, scheme of work, checklist, assessment and report comment is aligned to the Maldives National Curriculum.

Pick a tool, choose your grade, subject and outcomes, and FARUMA drafts ready-to-use material in your school's own format — so you spend less time formatting and more time teaching.

Upload Lesson Plan Template

Upload your school's Word (.docx) or PDF lesson plan template. Once uploaded, your template becomes the master format: every lesson plan uses only the sections in your template, in the same order, with no extra default headings added.

📄

or click to browse — .docx or .pdf supported
